items.title_zh: 只有当我们都停止问这些级别的问题并开始讨论……时，阿尔法才会消失。
items.description: alpha only gone when we all stop asking these level of questions and start discussion about on-policy autoaeo (does claude optimizing your aeo disproportionately work on claude?) vs generalizable aeo https://t.co/GrymTTqz6O
items.description_zh: 只有当我们不再问这些级别的问题并开始讨论政策性 autoaeo（克劳德优化你的 aeo 是否对克劳德不成比例地起作用？）与通用 aeo https://t.co/GrymTTqz6O 时，alpha 才消失

items.title: Oops...
items.description: Oops... I did it again. Enjoy reset usage limits for all paid users for Codex and ChatGPT Work. Super grateful for an incredible team who is iterating at lightspeed and keeping the infra up as we scale faster than ever. Enjoy the weekend!…
items.description_zh: 哎呀……我又这么做了。享受为所有付费用户重置 Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 的使用限制。非常感谢一支令人难以置信的团队，他们以光速进行迭代，并在我们比以往更快地扩展时保持基础设施的运行。享受周末！...

items.title: The reason I want this btw is spending an entire day staring at screens trying to manage…
items.title_zh: 顺便说一句，我想要这个的原因是花了一整天盯着屏幕试图管理......
items.description: The reason I want this btw is spending an entire day staring at screens trying to manage agents fries my brain. Much better to be walking around outside talking to the agents "on the phone" giving them work to do and having them update me…
items.description_zh: 顺便说一句，我想要这个的原因是花了一整天的时间盯着屏幕试图管理代理，这让我的大脑崩溃。更好的是在外面走动，与代理商“通过电话”交谈，让他们有工作要做，并让他们向我通报最新情况……

items.title: Why do you think kimi hurts Google?

items.description: Why do you think kimi hurts Google? Many enterprises won’t consume Kimi directly. They’ll get it through Google Cloud because they still need enterprise guarantees - security, data residency, compliance and most importantly, chips. Money o…
items.description_zh: 你认为 kimi 为什么会伤害 Google？很多企业不会直接消费Kimi。他们将通过谷歌云获得它，因为他们仍然需要企业保证——安全性、数据驻留、合规性，以及最重要的芯片。钱哦…
